fields.question: I agree to the terms set forth in the Actian Privacy Policy at https://www.actian.com/privacy-policy/
Actian is moving toward an AI-native ecosystem. How would you evolve a traditional metadata catalog (Zeenea) into a system where AI Agents proactively manage data products for a CDO?

Global Leadership: You will manage 5-6 PMs across the US and Europe. Describe your framework for maintaining high-velocity execution and "startup energy" while operating within a complex corporate structure.

How would you integrate AI tools across the product engineering lifecycle, from the initial discovery phase all the way to production, given
